title: Better Than Adventure! Modernized
description: This is a texture pack that aims to bring the modern art style to the Better Than Adventure mod. Though most blocks and items are backports of Modern textures, some are redesigned to fit better with Better Than Adventure's style.
body:
## Important: Currently, this pack is not being worked on. It ONLY works in Better Than Adventure v7.1. Any version past that will have missing textures. If you would like to port this resource pack to newer versions of BTA, please do! (just be sure to credit me for the original pack)
This is a texture pack that aims to bring the modern art style to the Better Than Adventure mod. Though most blocks and items are backports of Modern textures, some are redesigned to fit better with Better Than Adventure's style. (Basically, this pack is not JUST a backport of Jappa textures)



Currently, this pack is still a WIP and will be updated over time to include more textures and aim to retexture the entire game.


List of updated things:

- Blocks
- GUI
- Items
- Default Skin
- Armour
- Icons
- Colours

List of planned updates:

- Mobs

## NOTICE: This pack is intended to be played with the Better Than Adventure mod, and will not work in vanilla Minecraft.

Better Than Adventure: https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/3106066-better-than-adventure-for-beta-1-7-3-timely

[> BTA Website <](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)
